meaning: adj.笛声的,有凹槽的,长笛般的
examples: The teak table has fluted legs.
The Taylor house is that white one with the tall fluted column on Polyock Street.
Top view of fluted socket head set screw. Selection box represents thread diameter.
The man was believed to have fallen in an area between Aladdin's and Fluted Buttress.
In 1907, influenced by an ancient statue, the "Charioteer of Delphi, " and its gown of fluted folds, Fortuny fashioned an immortal dress.
